name: Hezbollah
summary: Day 76 of Hormuz blockade — Hezbollah-IDF kinetic continues at Day 18. **A7 IDF ANNOUNCED MAY 13 IT CARRIED OUT A 'WEEKLONG RAID' BEYOND THE LITANI RIVER NEAR ZAWTAR AL-SHARQIYAH, LED BY GOLANI BRIGADE'S RECONNAISSANCE UNIT — IDF itself now framing operation as sustained week-long campaign, not a one-off crossing** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel liveblog May 13, JNS, Haaretz). 'Some 15 Hezbollah operatives' killed past 24h; 'some 45 Hezbollah targets' total over 24h including command centres, surveillance posts, weapon depots. Hezbollah fired explosive drones at Israel May 13 — drones triggered Iron Dome interceptor over southern Lebanon that IDF later said was false alarm. Lebanese press: 13 killed in southern Lebanon strikes including child, woman, Lebanese army member; 2 Israeli soldiers wounded (CNN). **NO new Israeli soldier KIA past 24h — new 'Litani-induced Israeli KIA within 14 days' trigger added yesterday is at Day 2 of 14 and HAS NOT activated**. Civilian-inside-Israel ceiling continues to hold. **State Department CONFIRMED PRIMARY: third round US-facilitated Israel-Lebanon talks in Washington May 14-15, agenda includes 'complete disarmament of Hezbollah'** — direct institutional pressure on Hezbollah's structural status; April-23-extended 3-week ceasefire expires May 15 as talks finish. Hezbollah SG Naim Qassem's 'categorically rejects' direct talks line still operative but irrelevant to Karam-Dermer Washington bilateral. PRIOR (May 13): IDF Chief Eyal Zamir publicly declared 'there is no cease-fire in Lebanon.' Hezbollah continues precision strikes on IDF gatherings at al-Taybe, Shama, Biyyada, Alman-Al-Qusayr triangle, Khallet al-Raj near Deir Siryan (Press TV / Iranian state). Explosive drones at IDF troops landed in open areas. Lebanese Health Ministry ≥13 killed prior 24h; cumulative war toll 2,704 / 8,311 wounded (different reference framework vs yesterday's 2,869). NO new Israeli soldier KIA beyond Glovanyov (5th, May 10) — total holds at 5 since ceasefire despite Litani crossing; civilian-inside-Israel ceiling STILL HOLDS through May 13 (Day 1 of extended 14-day window after Glovanyov; no civilian casualty inside Israel proper). CGTN single-source May 12 SAM-at-IAF claim STILL NOT Western-corroborated; Day 2 of 7-day trigger window for Israeli corroboration. **Litani ground crossing materially raises casualty + miscalculation risk going forward — Hezbollah faces direct ground confrontation for first time since April 16 ceasefire.** ORIGINAL CONTEXT (May 12): **HEZBOLLAH EXPLOSIVE DRONE STRIKE NEAR MANARA (just inside Israel) MAY 10 ~16:00 KILLED IDF RESERVIST WO (RES.) ALEXANDER GLOVANYOV, 47, 6924th Transport Battalion, of Petah Tikva (announced May 11) = 5TH IDF SOLDIER KILLED post-April 16 ceasefire, ALL FIVE LINKED TO 'CHEAP, HARD-TO-DETECT' FPV/EXPLOSIVE DRONES.** Critically, Glovanyov is a SOLDIER killed on border, NOT a CIVILIAN inside Israel proper — May 10 trigger window for Israeli civilian casualty from Hezbollah expired UNTRIPPED on May 10, HOLDS through May 11-12 with no civilian casualty. **Civilian-inside-Israel ceiling has STILL HELD across the full window despite mounting IDF soldier casualties — Hezbollah is calibrating deliberately to military targets.** IDF struck 30+ Lebanon locations May 11 (evacuation warnings Rihan/Jarjouaa/Kfar Roummane/Nmairiyeh/Arab Salim/Jmaijmeh/Mashgharah/Qellaya/Harouf; drone strike Zebdine killed 2 civilians distributing bread; airstrike on Abba killed 2/wounded 5); **FIRST BEIRUT SOUTHERN-SUBURB STRIKE SINCE APRIL 16 CEASEFIRE.** Lebanese Health Ministry ≥23 killed prior 24h; cumulative war toll 2,869. May 12: IDF strikes Adshit (3 strikes), Haris (1 strike, 7th cumulative), Dabaal — ≥7 killed, 7 wounded (Lebanese NNA). **NEW MAY 12: surface-to-air missile fired from Lebanon at IAF aircraft over south Lebanon; IDF launched interceptor; alerts triggered along Israel's Mediterranean coast (REPORTED — CGTN single-source, needs Israeli-side corroboration).** Hezbollah claimed 24 attacks May 11 (artillery, drones, missiles at Khiam, Deir Seryan, Tayr Harfa, Bayyada, Rashaf, Naqoura) — Hezbollah-side CLAIMED, Israeli side reported only Glovanyov KIA. **Netanyahu CBS 60 Minutes aired May 11: war 'not over' until proxies neutralized — Haaretz the ONLY outlet treating Hezbollah linkage as deliberate war-extension ('Netanyahu Signals Hezbollah Fighting May Continue After Cease-fire').** Knesset extended reservist authority to May 31; IDF Chief Zamir said military needs 12,000 additional recruits — institutional read: Israeli political-military system institutionalizing war footing. The asymmetry continues: 2,869+ Lebanese killed cycle vs zero Israeli civilians inside Israel proper. Hezbollah SG Naim Qassem still 'categorically rejects' Lebanon-Israel direct talks.

active_triggers.condition: Hezbollah-IDF kinetic produces Israeli civilian casualty within 14 days (by 2026-05-11)
active_triggers.expiry_note: Window CLOSED May 11 UNTRIPPED. Capability demonstrated (5 IDF soldier KIAs incl. Glovanyov May 10), but civilian-inside-Israel ceiling held. Hezbollah calibrating deliberately to military targets only.

active_triggers.condition: Hezbollah produces Israeli civilian casualty within next 14 days (by 2026-05-26) — extended window post-Glovanyov
active_triggers.note_2026-05-13: Day 1 of 14. IDF Litani ground crossing May 12 raises both casualty + miscalculation risk for civilian-inside-Israel scenarios. No civilian casualty inside Israel proper through May 13.

active_triggers.condition: Litani-ground-crossing-induced Israeli soldier KIA within 14 days (by 2026-05-26) — would mark transition from drone-attrition to ground-engagement casualty regime
active_triggers.note: IDF ground crossed Litani at Zawtar al-Sharqiyah May 12 = first publicly-acknowledged ground crossing since April 16. Explosive drones at troops landed in open areas (no casualty). Risk profile rising.

active_triggers.condition: Hezbollah SAM-at-IAF-aircraft strike confirmed (corroborated by Israeli source) within 7 days of May 12 CGTN report
active_triggers.note: Single-source CGTN report May 12 of SAM fired from Lebanon at IAF aircraft. Needs Israeli-side corroboration. If confirmed = first SAM engagement of cycle, materially escalates ceiling.

recent_signals.headline: **A7 IDF ANNOUNCED MAY 13 'WEEKLONG RAID' BEYOND LITANI led by Golani Brigade's Reconnaissance Unit — meaningful UPGRADE from yesterday's 'first publicly-acknowledged Litani crossing': IDF itself now framing operation as sustained week-long campaign** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel May 13 liveblog primary + JNS + Haaretz). 'Some 15 Hezbollah operatives' killed past 24h; 'some 45 Hezbollah targets' total over 24h including command centres, surveillance posts, weapon depots. Hezbollah fired explosive drones at Israel May 13 (Haaretz May 13 liveblog) — drones triggered Iron Dome interceptor over southern Lebanon, IDF later said false alarm. Lebanese press: 13 killed in southern Lebanon (Jibsheet, Kfar Dounine, Nabatieh); 2 Israeli soldiers wounded (CNN). **NO new Israeli soldier KIA past 24h — new 'Litani-induced Israeli KIA within 14 days' trigger at Day 2 of 14 HAS NOT activated**. **STATE DEPARTMENT CONFIRMED PRIMARY: third round US-facilitated Israel-Lebanon talks in Washington May 14-15, agenda includes 'complete disarmament of Hezbollah' + 'full restoration of Lebanese state authority'** — direct institutional pressure on Hezbollah structural status. April-23-extended 3-week ceasefire expires May 15 as talks finish — choreographed. Hezbollah's Naim Qassem 'categorically rejects' direct talks line operative but irrelevant to Karam-Dermer bilateral track.
sources: Times of Israel 'IDF says it carried out weeklong raid on Hezbollah sites beyond Lebanon's Litani River' May 13
JNS 'WATCH: IDF tank strike kills Hezbollah terrorist in Lebanon'
US State Department primary 'Next Meeting Between the Governments of the United States, Lebanon, and Israel'
CFR 'Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire Extended for Three Weeks'
CNN Day 75 liveblog (13 killed Lebanon, 2 IDF wounded)
recent_signals.verification: IDF weeklong Litani raid framing = CONFIRMED ACTION (IDF own framing primary); Washington Israel-Lebanon talks May 14-15 = CONFIRMED (State Department primary); Lebanese casualty figures = CONFIRMED (Lebanese Health Ministry via CNN); 2 IDF wounded = CONFIRMED (CNN); Litani-KIA trigger NOT activated = CONFIRMED ABSENCE.

recent_signals.headline: A7 IDF GROUND TROOPS CROSSED LITANI RIVER MAY 12 NEAR ZAWTAR AL-SHARQIYAH (~10 km from border) = FIRST PUBLICLY-ACKNOWLEDGED ISRAELI GROUND CROSSING OF LITANI SINCE APRIL 16 CEASEFIRE; operation targeted Hezbollah military structures in overnight strikes; explosive drones at IDF troops landed in open areas (no casualty). IDF Chief of Staff Eyal Zamir: 'there is no cease-fire in Lebanon' = most senior IDF officer publicly declaring ceasefire dead. Hezbollah continues precision strikes on IDF gatherings at al-Taybe, Shama, Biyyada, Alman-Al-Qusayr triangle, Khallet al-Raj near Deir Siryan (Press TV / Iranian state attribution). Lebanese Health Ministry ≥13 killed prior 24h; cumulative toll 2,704 / 8,311 wounded. NO new Israeli soldier KIA beyond Glovanyov (5th, May 10) — total holds at 5 since ceasefire. Civilian-inside-Israel ceiling STILL HELD through May 13 — Day 1 of extended 14-day window after Glovanyov; no civilian casualty inside Israel proper. CGTN single-source May 12 SAM-at-IAF claim STILL NOT Western-corroborated; Day 2 of 7-day Israeli-corroboration window. **Litani ground crossing materially raises both casualty + miscalculation risk going forward — Hezbollah faces direct ground confrontation for first time since April 16 ceasefire. New trigger added: Litani-ground-crossing-induced Israeli soldier KIA within 14 days (by 2026-05-26).**
sources: Times of Israel liveblog May 12 (Litani crossing) — primary
Press TV (via Global Security Org) Hezbollah strikes — Iranian state
recent_signals.verification: Litani ground crossing May 12 = CONFIRMED (Times of Israel liveblog primary); Zamir 'no cease-fire' = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (IDF Chief on record); Hezbollah attribution to strikes at named IDF gatherings = REPORTED (Press TV / Iranian state); civilian-trigger UNTRIPPED HOLDS Day 1 of extended 14-day window; SAM May 12 = REPORTED CGTN single-source (Day 2 of 7-day Israeli-corroboration window).

recent_signals.headline: HEZBOLLAH EXPLOSIVE DRONE STRIKE NEAR MANARA (just inside Israel) MAY 10 ~16:00 KILLED IDF RESERVIST WO ALEXANDER GLOVANYOV (47, 6924th Transport Battalion, Petah Tikva); announced May 11 = 5TH IDF SOLDIER KILLED post-April 16 ceasefire, all by 'cheap, hard-to-detect' FPV/explosive drones. Glovanyov is SOLDIER not CIVILIAN — May 10 civilian-trigger window EXPIRED UNTRIPPED on May 10 HOLDS through May 12 with no civilian casualty. Civilian-inside-Israel ceiling has HELD across full window. IDF struck 30+ Lebanon locations May 11 (evacuation warnings 9 villages); Zebdine drone strike killed 2 civilians distributing bread; Abba airstrike killed 2/wounded 5; FIRST BEIRUT SOUTHERN-SUBURB STRIKE SINCE APRIL 16 CEASEFIRE. Lebanese Health Ministry ≥23 killed prior 24h; cumulative war toll 2,869. May 12: IDF strikes Adshit (3), Haris (1, 7th cumulative), Dabaal — ≥7 killed, 7 wounded. NEW MAY 12: SAM fired from Lebanon at IAF aircraft; IDF launched interceptor; Mediterranean coast alerts (CGTN single-source — needs Israeli-side corroboration). Hezbollah claimed 24 attacks May 11 at Khiam/Deir Seryan/Tayr Harfa/Bayyada/Rashaf/Naqoura (Hezbollah-side CLAIMED). Netanyahu CBS 60 Minutes May 11: war 'not over' until proxies neutralized — Haaretz only outlet treating Hezbollah linkage as deliberate war-extension. Knesset extended reservist authority to May 31; IDF Chief Zamir said military needs 12,000 additional recruits.
sources: Times of Israel + Ynet + Haaretz + JPost + JNS + Xinhua + Middle East Eye + VINnews (Glovanyov KIA, 7+ confirmations)
Al Jazeera + Lebanese NNA + Wikipedia 2026 Lebanon war timeline + Detroit News + Democracy Now (IDF strikes)
recent_signals.verification: Glovanyov KIA = CONFIRMED multi-source (IDF official + 7+ outlets); civilian-casualty trigger UNTRIPPED HOLDS (Glovanyov is SOLDIER); IDF Lebanon strikes incl. first Beirut southern-suburb since April 16 = CONFIRMED multi-source; SAM at IAF May 12 = REPORTED (CGTN single-source, needs Israeli-side corroboration); Hezbollah-claimed 24 attacks = CLAIMED (Hezbollah-side); Netanyahu 60 Minutes = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (broadcast primary); Knesset reservist + Zamir = CONFIRMED (JNS + ToI)

recent_signals.headline: DAY 14/14 OF TRIGGER WINDOW — IDF STRUCK 85+ HEZBOLLAH TARGETS IN SOUTHERN LEBANON IN PRIOR 24 HOURS (INCL. UNDERGROUND WEAPONS SITE IN BEQAA VALLEY, AFTER EVACUATION WARNINGS FOR 9 VILLAGES); 12 KILLED INCLUDING 7 IN SAKSAKIYEH SINGLE STRIKE (A GIRL AMONG THE DEAD); HEZBOLLAH RETALIATED VIA DRONE STRIKE NEAR MISGAV AM — IDF CONFIRMED 3 RESERVISTS WOUNDED BY HEZBOLLAH EXPLOSIVE DRONES (FIRST HEZBOLLAH-INFLICTED IDF CASUALTIES OF TRIGGER WINDOW BUT MILITARY TARGETS ONLY); MAY 8 MT. MERON DRONE IMPACT CORRECTED — IN TERRITORY ADJACENT TO LEBANON BORDER, NOT MERON AREA ITSELF; 2 SOLDIERS WOUNDED (ONE SERIOUSLY) BY DRONE IN ADJACENT TERRITORY. Structural read: kinetic exchange continues at elevated tempo with capability demonstrated on both sides, but line between 'military target' and 'civilian inside Israel proper' has HELD. Trigger window expires today with trigger UNTRIPPED. Asymmetry continues: Lebanese casualties cumulating, ZERO Israeli civilians inside Israel proper. Hezbollah SG Naim Qassem still 'categorically rejects' Lebanon-Israel direct talks. Coordination-decay framework holds at Day 14/14.
sources: Times of Israel May 9-10 live blogs
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED multi-source — IDF 85+ targets (IDF primary + Israeli mainstream); 12 Lebanese killed incl. 7 in Saksakiyeh = CONFIRMED (Times of Israel citing Lebanese Health Ministry, PBS, France 24); 3 IDF reservists wounded by Hezbollah drones = CONFIRMED (JPost, IDF acknowledged); Mt. Meron correction = CONFIRMED (Times of Israel correction); trigger 'Israeli civilian casualty inside Israel proper' UNTRIPPED Day 14/14 (capability demonstrated, civilian ceiling intact)

recent_signals.headline: HEZBOLLAH FIRST CROSS-BORDER DRONE REACH OF CYCLE — 'SWARM OF DRONES' TARGETED MT. MERON IDF AIR-TRAFFIC-CONTROL BASE INSIDE ISRAEL PROPER (MILITARY TARGET, NO ISRAELI CASUALTIES); TRIGGER 'ISRAELI CIVILIAN CASUALTY INSIDE ISRAEL PROPER WITHIN 14 DAYS' STILL UNTRIPPED DAY 13/14. Hezbollah claimed retaliation for Israel's May 6 Beirut strike (Ballout + 2 senior commanders) and ongoing IDF strikes in southern Lebanon. PBS reported rockets 'hit open areas in Israel' no casualties. IDF airstrikes Friday killed 5-10 in southern Lebanon (paramedic, 2 children, 3 women per Lebanon health ministry; Toura, Kfar Chouba, others). Saturday May 9: IDF airstrike on car near Bafliyeh killed 4 Hezbollah members. Mt. Meron is IDF's primary northern air-traffic-control facility ~8 km from Lebanon border. Capability demonstrated, military-target ceiling intact. Coordination-decay framework holds at Day 13/14, Day 14 ~May 10 = last day of originally-flagged window.
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED ACTION — Mt. Meron drone swarm + 5-10 Lebanese killed Friday + 4 Hezbollah killed Saturday Bafliyeh; trigger 'Israeli civilian casualty inside Israel proper' UNTRIPPED at Day 13/14 (capability demonstrated, ceiling intact)

recent_signals.headline: RADWAN COMMANDER MALEK BALLOUT KILLED IN BEIRUT SUBURBS STRIKE MAY 6 — FIRST ISRAELI STRIKE ON LEBANESE CAPITAL SINCE MID-APRIL CEASEFIRE; PM NETANYAHU PERSONALLY ANNOUNCED ORDERING IT. HEZBOLLAH HAS NOT RETALIATED. 13 killed in southern/eastern Lebanon May 5-6; 12-village forced displacement orders (most north of Litani — outside occupation zones, in violation of April 16 ceasefire). Day 11/14 of Israeli-civilian-casualty trigger window — ALL 13+ casualties Lebanese, ZERO Israeli civilians inside Israel proper. Coordination-decay framework holds (Houthi non-action, weak Lebanon retaliation).
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED multi-source — Beirut strike + Ballout killing + 13 casualties + 12-village displacement orders + Hezbollah non-retaliation

recent_signals.headline: DAY 10/14 TRIGGER WINDOW (CLOSES MAY 11) — HEZBOLLAH ROCKETS+DRONE INTERCEPTED BEFORE ISRAELI TERRITORY; NO IDF/CIVILIAN CASUALTIES; ASYMMETRY HARDENS (2,659+ LEBANESE KILLED VS ZERO ISRAELI CIVILIANS)
HEZBOLLAH MORTAR RETALIATIONS MAY 4 (NO IDF CASUALTIES); IDF STRUCK 20+ S LEBANON LOCATIONS; DAY 9/14 TRIGGER WINDOW NO ISRAELI CIVILIAN CASUALTY INSIDE ISRAEL PROPER
HEZBOLLAH-LEBANON 80+ KILLED IN 48 HOURS BY IDF STRIKES — ONE-SIDED ESCALATION DESPITE APR 17 CEASEFIRE
KINETIC DAY 2 — IDF STRUCK 20+ HEZBOLLAH-LINKED SITES MONDAY; CIVILIAN-CASUALTY TRIGGER STILL OPEN
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED IDF strike count + CONFIRMED no Israeli

historical_summaries.summary: 5 signals. Hezbollah launched strikes on Israel in response to Khamenei's killing | Israel launched ground incursion into southern Lebanon in response | Nearly 1,000 dead in Lebanon from 2 weeks of fighting

29 signals. Israel killed Haj Youssef Ismail Hashem — commander of Hezbollah's southern front — in Beirut airstrike on April 1 | Israel struck Lebanon April 1, coinciding with Trump's primetime address | CLAIMED (Hezbollah): Fired cruise missile at Israeli warship at midnight April 6, 68 nautical miles off Lebanese coast
